<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator-report child:26 resume:dispatched -->

Sepo orchestration needs clarification before it can continue.

Parent orchestration is paused because child issue #26 / PR #117 failed during fix-pr. The last review asked for a small branch change, but the automated fix-pr run returned `no_changes`, so continuing automatically could skip an unresolved PR state.

Clarification request: Should Sepo retry PR #117 with the explicit fix-pr instruction to add `continue-on-error: true` to the `failure_report_auth` step, or should #107 remain paused for manual handling?

- Source action: `orchestrate`
- Source conclusion: `failed`
- Target: `issue #107`
- Round: `3/10`
- Reason: agent planner blocked: Child #26 ended failed because PR #117 fix-pr returned no_changes after a review-requested branch change; parent #107 should pause instead of continuing or re-reviewing automatically.
- Source run ID: `25274892749`

No follow-up workflow was dispatched. Reply with the requested context, then continue with `/orchestrate`, `/implement`, or `/answer` when ready.

<!-- sepo-agent-orchestrate-stop -->
